meta.title: GEONYX | Agro, Biogas, Fertilisers & Animal Environments – Chemical-Resistant Protection
meta.description: GEONYX designs mineral floor and protective systems for agro farms, biogas plants, silos, manure storage and livestock environments – resistant to ammonia, acids, biogenic corrosion, fertilisers and aggressive organic environments. Long-lasting protection of concrete and infrastructure.

tender.text: Surfaces in fertiliser warehouses, farms, barns, milking parlours, biogas plants, rendering facilities, composting sites and zoos shall be executed with mineral geopolymer systems of the GEONYX type or equivalent, combining ARMOR / CHEM / HYDRO / THERM / REPAIR according to environmental aggression and mechanical load. Systems shall provide chemical resistance to manure, ammonia, organic acids and agrochemicals, watertightness of structural elements, controlled slip resistance and the ability for local repair without long downtime.

hero.description: In agro and biogas environments concrete lives constantly in manure, ammonia and moisture. GEONYX builds mineral systems resistant to organic matter, agrochemicals and fermentation.

scope.title: SCOPE
scope.z4: Shelters and concrete areas for feed and silage
scope.z5: Loading/unloading platforms for manure and feed
scope.z7: Manure lagoons, settlers and settling basins
scope.z8: Channels, septic systems and drainage troughs for liquid manure
scope.z10: Agro infrastructure around farms (service and support zones)

manifesto.body: Manure, ammonia, fertiliser silos, fermentate and constant moisture destroy standard concrete within a few years. GEONYX replaces paint and temporary coatings with mineral systems specifically designed for agro and biogas environments – resistant to organic matter, acidity and wet/dry cycles.

b1.title: SILOS AND MINERAL FERTILISER WAREHOUSES
b1.problem: Mineral fertilisers (ammonium nitrate, phosphates, potassium salts) combined with moisture form a highly corrosive environment. Concrete begins to crumble, holes and dust appear, and loading equipment further damages the floor. Cleaning becomes difficult and the risk of soil and groundwater contamination grows.
b1.solution: GEONYX CHEM + ARMOR create a dense mineral surface with high chemical resistance and mechanical strength. HYDRO details at joints, walls and drainage stop solution penetration into the structure. The result is a robust floor that withstands fertiliser, moisture and heavy front loaders.

b2.title: FARMS, BARNS AND MILKING PARLOURS – MANURE, URINE AND AMMONIA
b2.problem: In barns and milking parlours the floor is permanently wet – manure, urine, washing water and disinfectants. Concrete is eaten away, holes and slippery patches appear, animals slip, and cleaning requires ever more time and water.
b2.solution: GEONYX HYDRO + CHEM provide a watertight and chemically resistant surface that does not break down from ammonia and organic matter. ARMOR handles traffic from animals, tractors and feeding equipment. The surface is designed with suitable texture – safe for hooves and boots but easy to wash.

b3.title: BIOGAS AND FERMENTATE – AGGRESSIVE ACID ENVIRONMENT
b3.problem: In biogas plants concrete is in contact with fermentate, gases, condensation and high humidity. Classic concrete and resin coatings crack and delaminate, leading to leaks, odours and costly repair shutdowns.
b3.solution: GEONYX CHEM + HYDRO build mineral systems for fermentate tanks, troughs and platforms, resistant to organic acids and gases. THERM is used in zones with elevated temperatures around reactors and pipe runs. REPAIR allows local repairs without long plant shutdowns.

b4.title: RENDERING PLANTS AND ANIMAL WASTE
b4.problem: In rendering plants the floor absorbs blood, fat, water, aggressive cleaning solutions and heavy loads. Standard floorings quickly become porous, retain odours and represent a sanitary risk.
b4.solution: GEONYX CHEM creates a dense, chemically resistant surface without pores or micro-cracks. HYDRO protects zones of constant moisture and channels, while ARMOR guarantees strength for machinery and containers. The surface cleans faster and does not retain odours.

b5.title: COMPOST AND OPEN WASTE AREAS
b5.problem: Composting facilities combine organic matter, moisture, acidity and heavy machinery traffic. Concrete breaks down, muddy holes appear and environmental contamination occurs.
b5.solution: GEONYX ARMOR + CHEM build a wear-resistant mineral surface for front loaders and excavators, resistant to organic acidity. HYDRO details at manholes and the perimeter limit soil infiltration. REPAIR allows rapid restoration of local damage.

b6.title: GREENHOUSES, HYDROPONICS AND AGROCHEMICALS
b6.problem: In greenhouses and hydroponic systems the floor is permanently wet – nutrient solutions, acid and alkali correction agents, drip irrigation and condensation. Standard concrete cracks, water puddles and algae appear.
b6.solution: GEONYX HYDRO + CHEM provide a watertight and chemically resistant surface through which solutions do not penetrate the structure. ARMOR handles traffic from trolleys and mobile benches. The surface is designed for easy water direction towards gutters and drains.

b7.title: ZOOS, AQUARIUMS AND ANIMAL POOLS
b7.problem: In zoos and aquariums floors and troughs are subjected to water, excrement, salt, chlorine and mechanical wear from animals and service equipment. Cracks and leaks lead to water losses and structural risk.
b7.solution: GEONYX HYDRO creates monolithic, watertight systems for troughs and wet zones, while CHEM provides resistance to salt, chlorine and cleaning chemicals. ARMOR protects passages and service zones with traffic. Wet/dry transition details are executed without weak points.

roi.title: INVESTMENT AUDIT
roi.r1param: Resistance to manure, urine and ammonia
roi.r2param: Resistance to constant moisture and fermentation
roi.r3epoxy: Medium – sensitive to impact and scratching
roi.r5param: Risk of leaks and soil contamination

applications.title: WHERE IT IS USED
applications.subtitle: GEONYX systems cover the full cycle – from fertiliser warehouses and farms to biogas, compost and zoos.
applications.a1desc: Indoor and outdoor areas for ammonium nitrate, phosphates and blended fertilisers.
applications.a2desc: Corridors, stalls, milking lines and animal yards.
applications.a3desc: Production paths, technical corridors and solution mixing areas.
applications.a4desc: Fermentate tanks, troughs, service platforms and reception pits.
applications.a5desc: Compost pads, temporary depots and front-loader routes.
applications.a6desc: Receiving, processing, washing and temporary storage zones.
applications.a7desc: Animal pools, service corridors and wet rooms.
applications.a8desc: Manure channels, lagoons and drainage gutters around agro sites.

systems.title: GEONYX SYSTEM SELECTION
systems.subtitle: In agro and biogas projects system selection depends on the combination of manure/ammonia, moisture, traffic and temperature regime. GEONYX combines ARMOR, CHEM, HYDRO, THERM and REPAIR by zone.
systems.s1desc: Mineral systems with high chemical resistance to manure, ammonia, organic acids, agrochemicals and fermentate.
systems.s2desc: Watertight solutions for lagoons, channels, wash-down zones and permanently wet surfaces.
systems.s3desc: Mechanically resistant floors for heavy traffic – tractors, front loaders, trailers and containers.
systems.s4desc: Systems for zones with elevated temperatures around reactors, pipes and warm processes.
systems.s5desc: Fast geopolymer solutions for local repair of corroded concrete and joints without long site shutdowns.

workflow.title: EXECUTION PROCESS
workflow.w1desc: Assessment of existing concrete, aggressive environments (manure, fertilisers, fermentate), cleaning regime and equipment loading.
workflow.w2desc: Division of the site into zones: fertiliser warehouse, farms and barns, milking, biogas, compost, rendering, zoo/aquarium.
workflow.w3desc: Selection of ARMOR / CHEM / HYDRO / THERM / REPAIR for each zone based on chemistry, moisture, traffic and temperatures.
workflow.w4desc: Mechanical preparation, treatment of joints, channels, drains and critical details at walls and steel elements.
workflow.w5desc: Systems applied in phases so that the farm or plant continues to operate with minimal downtime.
workflow.w6desc: Execution inspection, documentation and training for cleaning and maintenance in agro and biogas mode.

offer.title: OFFER PACKAGE
offer.description: For agro, biogas and fertiliser sites GEONYX prepares a complete technical package for investors, banks, regulatory bodies and public procurement.
offer.qualityDesc: All documents comply with current Eurocodes and standards.
offer.i1: Zoning by aggression – manure, fertilisers, fermentate, agrochemicals
offer.i2: Description of ARMOR / CHEM / HYDRO / THERM / REPAIR systems for each zone
offer.i3: Details for lagoons, channels, silos and drainage
offer.i4: Leak risk assessment and soil and water protection measures
offer.i5: Recommended execution schedule without stopping the entire site
offer.i6: Warranty conditions and cleaning and maintenance instructions

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: WILL GEONYX SYSTEMS WITHSTAND MANURE, URINE AND AMMONIA IN THE LONG TERM?
faq.a1: Yes. CHEM configurations are designed for organic acidity, ammonia and agrochemicals. During the audit we select the specific system based on your processes and loading.
faq.q2: CAN WE CONTINUE OPERATING THE FARM OR BIOGAS PLANT DURING REPAIRS?
faq.a2: Usually – yes. We design phased execution so that only individual zones are closed, and REPAIR allows fast return to service.
faq.q3: ARE THE SYSTEMS SUITABLE FOR OPEN AREAS AND EXTERNAL LAGOONS?
faq.a3: Yes. HYDRO and ARMOR configurations are developed for outdoor conditions, freeze/thaw cycles and heavy machinery traffic, limiting the risk of leaks to the soil.

cta.title: COMPREHENSIVE SITE ZONING
cta.description: Every site has specific risks. We integrate 6 specialised matrices into one system: from mechanics, chemistry and thermal shock, to waterproofing, anti-static and architecture. One technology that guarantees 100% coverage of needs and full compatibility.
